nodes.name: Instagram Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Production Instagram webhook receiver. Production executions appear in n8n Executions, not as visible test canvas data.

nodes.name: Normalize Instagram Event
nodes.notes: Extracts IG sender/thread/message and blocks outbound echo loops using IG_INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID.

nodes.name: Get Tenant Settings
nodes.notes: Loads per-tenant brand/language/style/confidence settings from Supabase.

nodes.name: Get Thread Context
nodes.notes: Loads recent conversation context from Supabase for the current Instagram thread.

nodes.name: Is Instagram Message
nodes.notes: Routes only real inbound Instagram messages. Non-message events and outbound echo events stop here.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  tenant_id: $json.tenant_id,
  channel: 'instagram',
  instagram_thread_id: $json.thread_id,
  role: 'user',
  content: $json.message_text,
  intent: $json.intent,
  confidence: $json.intent_confidence || 0,
  matched_document_ids: [],
  model_name: 'inbound_event',
  latency_ms: 0,
  escalated: false,
  raw_event: $json.raw_event || {}
}) }}

nodes.name: Match Documents
nodes.notes: Supabase pgvector retrieval. Embeddings are stored in Supabase, not local files or external vector stores.

nodes.name: Should Escalate
nodes.notes: Low-confidence or explicit handoff requests route to escalation.

nodes.name: Build Escalation Reply
nodes.notes: Creates the one-time customer-facing escalation message. After this, the thread state is marked escalated.

nodes.name: Generate Reply
nodes.notes: Generates grounded answer from normalized message, thread context, tenant settings, and retrieved Supabase chunks.

nodes.name: Send Instagram Reply
nodes.notes: Sends normal bot reply through Instagram Messaging API.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  tenant_id: $node['Parse Reply'].json.tenant_id,
  channel: 'instagram',
  instagram_thread_id: $node['Parse Reply'].json.thread_id,
  role: 'assistant',
  content: $node['Parse Reply'].json.llm_answer,
  intent: $node['Parse Reply'].json.intent,
  confidence: $node['Parse Reply'].json.answer_confidence || 0,
  matched_document_ids: $node['Parse Reply'].json.retrieved_document_ids || [],
  model_name: $node['Parse Reply'].json.model_name,
  latency_ms: 0,
  escalated: $node['Parse Reply'].json.escalated || false,
  raw_event: $node['Parse Reply'].json.raw_event || {}
}) }}

nodes.name: Build Handoff Reply
nodes.notes: Creates the one-time handoff reply for explicit human/operator requests.

nodes.name: Log Handoff

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  tenant_id: $json.tenant_id,
  channel: 'instagram',
  instagram_thread_id: $json.thread_id,
  role: 'assistant',
  content: $json.llm_answer,
  intent: $json.intent,
  confidence: $json.answer_confidence || 0,
  matched_document_ids: [],
  model_name: $json.model_name,
  latency_ms: 0,
  escalated: true,
  raw_event: $json.raw_event || {}
}) }}

nodes.notes: Writes the handoff/escalation event to conversation_events with escalated=true.

nodes.name: Send Handoff Reply
nodes.notes: Sends the one-time handoff/escalation reply through Instagram Messaging API.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  tenant_id: $json.tenant_id,
  channel: 'instagram',
  instagram_thread_id: $json.thread_id,
  role: 'assistant',
  content: $json.llm_answer,
  intent: $json.intent,
  confidence: $json.answer_confidence || 0,
  matched_document_ids: [],
  model_name: $json.model_name,
  latency_ms: 0,
  escalated: false,
  raw_event: $json.raw_event || {}
}) }}

nodes.name: Can Send Instagram Reply
nodes.notes: Live-send safety gate for normal replies.

nodes.name: Can Send Handoff Reply
nodes.notes: Live-send safety gate for handoff/escalation replies.

nodes.name: Get Thread State
nodes.notes: Reads current per-thread bot state from Supabase. If status is escalated, the bot must stay silent until an operator runs reset_thread_escalation.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { p_tenant_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.tenant_id, p_channel: "instagram", p_thread_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.thread_id } }}

nodes.name: Escalation Silence Gate
nodes.notes: True branch means bot may continue. False branch logs the inbound message and sends nothing because the thread is already escalated.

nodes.name: Log Muted Escalated Message
nodes.notes: Audit-only branch. The customer message is logged, but the bot intentionally sends no second escalation message.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.tenant_id, channel: "instagram", instagram_thread_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.thread_id, role: "user", content: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.message_text, intent: "muted_after_escalation", confidence: 1, escalated: true, raw_event: { route: "silent_after_escalation", thread_state: $node["Get Thread State"].json, original_event: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.raw_event } } }}

nodes.name: Silent: Already Escalated
nodes.notes: Terminal branch. Expected behavior: workflow execution succeeds and sends no Instagram reply until the operator resets thread state.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: "silent_already_escalated", reason: "operator_reset_required", tenant_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.tenant_id, channel: "instagram", thread_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.thread_id, reset_rpc: "reset_thread_escalation" } }];

nodes.name: Mark Thread Escalated
nodes.notes: Sets thread_states.status=escalated. Future inbound messages from this thread are logged but not answered until a human resets the marker.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { p_tenant_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.tenant_id, p_channel: "instagram", p_thread_id: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.thread_id, p_reason: "bot_handoff_or_escalation", p_metadata: { source: "n8n_demo_rag_instagram", last_user_message: $node["Normalize Instagram Event"].json.message_text } } }}

parameters.content:
## Instagram DM RAG bot
Inbound Instagram webhook -> normalize -> Supabase thread state -> tenant/thread context -> intent -> Supabase pgvector retrieval -> OpenAI reply -> Instagram send -> audit log.

Secrets stay in n8n/.env only. Public repo exports use env references.

## Supabase native vector memory
Use `documents.embedding vector(1536)` plus RPC retrieval. Do not add external vector DBs, AWS/S3 wrappers, or local embeddings for this flow.

`conversation_events` = audit log.
`thread_states` = current bot routing state.

## Escalation silence rule
When the bot escalates, `thread_states.status` becomes `escalated`. Future messages in the same IG thread are logged but receive no bot reply.

Reset in Supabase SQL when a human wants bot replies again:
`select public.reset_thread_escalation('demo', 'instagram', 'THREAD_ID', 'operator', 'ready for bot again');`
